message:
fix: Remove duplicate checkmarks in hook success messages

printSuccess() already adds ✅, no need to include it in the message.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
